title: prunus nucipersica
intro: Prunus nucipersica, also known as the nectarine, is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a variation of the peach tree. The medicinal properties of Prunus nucipersica include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming nectarine include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. Nectarine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make jams, preserves, and other culinary products.
